children.name: Insight Description
children.characters: Your fluid needs are higher today due to training intensity. Starting earlier will help maintain energy and performance.

children.name: Recommendation 1
children.characters: Increase intake over the next few hours.

children.name: Recommendation 2
children.characters: Keep fluids steady instead of catching up later.

children.name: Recommendation 3
children.characters: Focus on hydration around your next activity.
